span.p:
MIR module lowered
count total_insns post-lowering

span.p:
MIR_set_interp_interface at link
no native codegen, builds icode
link cost near-zero, per-insn exec slower

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
MIR_set_gen_interface at link
per-function MIR_gen (codegen+regalloc)
link cost = sum of MIR_gen, native exec

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
why large/cold modules interpret:
link is eager per-function codegen,
vendor JS is mostly never called,
so paying codegen never amortizes
